title: sphaeralcea sandemanii
intro: Sphaeralcea sandemanii, also known as Sandeman's globe mallow, is a species of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat bacterial infections. The health benefits of Sphaeralcea sandemanii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Sphaeralcea sandemanii may be found in the form of teas, infusions, and capsules, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for medicinal use.
